info.name: Unbounce Intake API
info.description:
Post forms to the Unbounce Intake API. Use with **Unbounce Intake API Environment (Dev)** for org URL or **Unbounce Intake API Environment (Experience Cloud)** for site URL.

**URL:** Requests use `{{base_url}}/{{rest_path}}/v1/unbounce/intakes`. **rest_path** differs by environment: **Experience Cloud** uses `apexrest` (site path); **Dev** (direct org with session) uses `services/apexrest`. Set **base_url** to your site or org root; each environment pre-fills **rest_path**.

**Auth:** Send **X-Api-Key** with the value from Unbounce Integration Config (Setup). If no API Key is configured, the header is optional.

**Setup:** Create an Unbounce Integration Config record with Is Active = true; optional API Key, Referred By Party Name, Webhook Secret. Assign **Unbounce Intake API (Guest)** to the Experience Cloud guest profile when using the site URL.

**Mapped fields:** email, name, last_name, phone_number, page_url, utm_source, campaignid, utm_medium, utm_content, how_can_we_help_you, gclid, casetype (or caseType); fallbacks: first_name/firstName, phone, description/message, URL/url; address, city, state, zip; submission_id/id → ExternalId.

item.name: Create Intake

header.description: Required if API Key is set in Unbounce Integration Config

body.raw:
{
  "email": "jane.smith@example.com",
  "name": "Jane",
  "last_name": "Smith",
  "phone_number": "(555) 123-4567",
  "page_url": "https://example.com/landing",
  "utm_source": "google",
  "campaignid": "summer-2025",
  "utm_medium": "cpc",
  "utm_content": "ad-variant-a",
  "how_can_we_help_you": "Lead from Unbounce landing page",
  "gclid": "EAIaIQobChMI_test_gclid",
  "casetype": "Auto Accident",
  "address": "123 Main St",
  "city": "New York",
  "state": "NY",
  "zip": "10001",
  "submission_id": "ub-12345"
}

item.description: Creates an intake with all supported Unbounce-style keys: email, name, last_name, phone_number, page_url, utm_source, campaignid, utm_medium, utm_content, how_can_we_help_you, gclid, casetype; address fields; submission_id.

item.name: Create Intake (with data wrapper)
item.description: Payload with a "data" wrapper (e.g. Unbounce webhooks). Same keys as flat payload; use Unbounce Field Mapping to flatten if needed.

item.name: Create Intake (with signature)

header.description: HMAC-SHA256 of raw body (hex). Set in pre-request or leave empty if no Webhook Secret.

item.description: When Unbounce Integration Config has a Webhook Secret, send x-unbounce-signature (HMAC-SHA256 of raw body, hex). If no secret, signature is optional.

item.name: Create Intake – Invalid JSON (expect 400)
item.description: Sends invalid JSON to verify the API returns 400 with an error message.
